description.en: Use when a user wants to withdraw their signature from a multi-sig proposal they previously signed. Only works if the user has already signed the proposal.
description.de: Verwenden, wenn ein Benutzer seine Unterschrift von einem Multi-Sig-Vorschlag zurückziehen möchte, den er zuvor signiert hat. Funktioniert nur, wenn der Benutzer den Vorschlag bereits signiert hat.
description.es: Use when a user wants to withdraw their signature from a multi-sig proposal they previously signed. Only works if the user has already signed the proposal.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to withdraw their signature from a multi-sig proposal they previously signed. Only works if the user has already signed the proposal.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to withdraw their signature from a multi-sig proposal they previously signed. Only works if the user has already signed the proposal.
description.it: Use when a user wants to withdraw their signature from a multi-sig proposal they previously signed. Only works if the user has already signed the proposal.

description.en: The ID of the proposal to withdraw your signature from.
description.de: Die ID des Vorschlags, von dem du deine Unterschrift zurückziehen möchtest.
description.es: The ID of the proposal to withdraw your signature from.
description.fr: The ID of the proposal to withdraw your signature from.
description.ro: The ID of the proposal to withdraw your signature from.
description.it: The ID of the proposal to withdraw your signature from.

inputs.bot: If the user hasn't specified an action ID, first run 'Get Pending Actions' to show what's available.

success.en: Your signature has been withdrawn from proposal {{ACTION_ID}}.
success.de: Deine Unterschrift wurde vom Vorschlag {{ACTION_ID}} zurückgezogen.
success.es: Your signature has been withdrawn from proposal {{ACTION_ID}}.
success.fr: Your signature has been withdrawn from proposal {{ACTION_ID}}.
success.ro: Your signature has been withdrawn from proposal {{ACTION_ID}}.
success.it: Your signature has been withdrawn from proposal {{ACTION_ID}}.
